name: HMS Cuddles
notes: Port's Naval troop-transport, lightly armed — unlike Transport Truck, relies partly on its own guns and partly on Gunboat escort. Kraken Point's Shipyard fields the bigger, fully-unarmed multi-squad answer instead: Tank Carrier, which also carries Land vehicles, not just Infantry (see data/troops/tank_carrier.json). Unlike Transport Truck/Aircraft Carrier/Tank Carrier, cannot deploy its boarded Infantry squad mid-combat — must be idle/docked to unload.
